top_signals.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy seeks progress on peace talks before winter
top_signals.summary: Talks brokered by the United States on moving toward a peace accord have stalled as Washington has focused on the conflict ​in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia-Pacific markets set to open mixed as Trump signals no rush on Iran agreement
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open mixed on Monday as investors monitored lingering uncertainty around U.S.-Iran negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
